bank.retain_mission: Extract DevOps/SRE decisions, embedded/firmware deployment patterns, and incident-response outcomes.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about infra topology, SLOs, deploy pipeline, on-call rotation, and recurring incident classes. Ignore one-off page noise.

mental_models.name: Infra & SLOs
mental_models.source_query: What is the infra topology and what SLOs are in force? Include deploy pipeline and on-call rotation.

mental_models.name: Incident Patterns
mental_models.source_query: What incident classes recur, and what mitigations and runbooks have actually worked?
